home__description: 8 years of front-end experience focused on edtech and SaaS products, with strengths in Three.js interaction, Canvas visualization, and component-driven business systems.
about__description:
Experienced in edtech and campus information system projects, with solid hands-on delivery across Vue 2, Vue 3, React, TypeScript, and Ant Design.
Long-term work in Three.js-based 3D teaching interaction, Canvas editing tools, low-code platforms, and workflow systems, with strong attention to performance, component architecture, and user experience.
Continuously builds reusable components, flow designers, and rendering capabilities to balance delivery efficiency with maintainability.
qualification1__subtitle: Hefei Science and Technology Vocational College
qualification3__subtitle: Anhui Xiyue Education Technology Co., Ltd. · Content R&D
qualification4__subtitle: Anhui Yuzhilan Education Software Co., Ltd. · Technology R&D
portfolio1__title: Spark Academy Interactive Teaching Resource Platform
portfolio1__description: Built 3D teaching scenes and an interactive resource platform with Three.js, Vue, TypeScript, and GSAP, covering particle effects, shader animation, model split demonstrations, and classroom interaction.
portfolio2__title: Teaching Assets and Subject Tool Engine
portfolio2__description: Used Konva.js, Fabric.js, and Interact.js to build 2D asset libraries, annotation tools, drag/resize/rotate interaction, and snapping algorithms for efficient teaching content editing and presentation.
portfolio3__description: Implemented approval flows, dynamic forms, list rendering engines, and process designers with React, Ant Design, and TypeScript, while improving cross-device support, component reuse, and runtime performance.
